questions.question: What is the function of a 2:1 multiplexer?
options: To select one of three inputs
To select one of two inputs and one selector input
To select one of three inputs based on a selector input
To select one of four inputs
questions.explanation: A 2:1 multiplexer selects one of three inputs based on a selector input.

questions.question: What is the function of a 4:1 multiplexer?
options: To select one of four inputs
To select one of two inputs and one selector input
To select one of three inputs based on a selector input
To select one of two inputs and one selector input and one enable input
questions.explanation: A 4:1 multiplexer selects one of four inputs based on a selector input and enable input.

questions.question: What is the function of a 4:2 multiplexer?
options: To select one of two inputs and one selector input
To select one of four inputs
To select one of two inputs and one selector input and one enable input
To select one of two inputs and one enable input
questions.explanation: A 4:2 multiplexer selects one of four inputs and then selects one of two inputs based on a selector input.

questions.question: What is the function of a 2:1 demultiplexer?
options: To select one of three inputs
To select one of two inputs and one selector input
To select one of three inputs based on a selector input
To select one of two inputs
questions.explanation: A 2:1 demultiplexer selects one of two inputs based on a selector input.

questions.question: How many inputs does a 6:2 multiplexer have?
options: 4 inputs
5 inputs
6 inputs
7 inputs
questions.explanation: A 6:2 multiplexer has six inputs and then selects one of two inputs based on a selector input.
